''' Harthis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], he was the administrative assistant to [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] commander [[Gavin Darklighter]].

{{Char-stub}}
